title: Cuneiform Tablet #0193: Achaemenid Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
